nasb.text: Therefore, I gave her into the hand of her lovers, into the hand of the Assyrians, after whom she lusted.

esv.text: Therefore I delivered her into the hands of her lovers, into the hands of the Assyrians, after whom she lusted.

cnv.text: 因此我把她交在她的愛人手裡，就是她所戀慕的亞述人手裡。

ccb.text: 因此，我把她交在她所恋慕的亚述人手里。
